name: btst-form-builder
title: Form Builder Plugin Pages
description: Ejectable page components for the @btst/stack form-builder plugin. Customize the UI layer while keeping data-fetching in @btst/stack.
author: BTST <https://better-stack.ai>

files.content:
"use client"; import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton"; import { PageWrapper } from "../shared/page-wrapper"; export function SubmissionsSkeleton() { return (
{Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
))}
); }
